title: Appendix: Useful Mathematical Formulas
summary: This appendix page provides a reference collection of useful mathematical formulas organized into three subsections: numerical constants (π, e, log values), complex number identities (Euler's formula, polar form, modulus and argument), and summation formulas (geometric series, power sums, and weighted geometric sums). The summation formulas include both finite series for integers, squares, and k·r^k and k²·r^k weighted sums.
